positive: A mystical celestial owl perched on an ornate moonlit branch, rendered in a stylized Art Nouveau silhouette. The owl has glowing, jewel-toned eyes and soft feather details, contrasted against solid, dark midnight blues and cosmic purples. Surrounding elements include swirling nebula patterns, crescent moons, and minimalist constellations, designed for high-contrast screen printing. Excellent symmetry, clean vector lines, and graphic depth. Cinematic lighting, deep shadow play, suitable for apparel decoration.
